recommendations.one_line_thesis_en: Amplify CWP Enhanced Dividend Income: HOLD (medium) — score 46/100, conf 66%.
recommendations.one_line_thesis_ko: Amplify CWP Enhanced Dividend Income: HOLD (medium) — 점수 46/100, 신뢰도 66%.
recommendations.rationale_en: We read Amplify CWP Enhanced Dividend Income as a hold on the medium horizon — composite score 46/100, 66% confidence. Above all, above its 200-day moving average (primary uptrend intact). That said, capped upside — lags the underlying in strong advances (opportunity cost). We'd step back if a daily close below the 50-day MA (~45.94).
recommendations.rationale_ko: Amplify CWP Enhanced Dividend Income은(는) 중기 관점에서 '보유'로 봅니다. 종합 점수 46/100, 신뢰도 66%입니다. 무엇보다 주가가 200일선 위에 있어 큰 추세가 상승으로 유지되고 있습니다. 다만 상승 여력 제한 — 강한 상승장에서 기초자산에 뒤처집니다(기회비용). 50일선(~45.94)을 종가로 내주면 판단을 거둡니다.
reasons: Above its 200-day moving average (primary uptrend intact).
catalysts: Upcoming macro prints (CPI/PCE, jobs) and FOMC communication.
Sector earnings season relevant to Amplify CWP Enhanced Dividend Income.
risks: Capped upside — lags the underlying in strong advances (opportunity cost).
NAV erosion risk if distributions exceed total return.
Distribution yield ≠ total return; payouts may include return of capital.
ETF/keyless tier: no bottom-up fundamentals (medium-long conviction limited).
invalidation_conditions: A daily close below the 50-day MA (~45.94).
A shift in the broad market to a risk-off / correction state.
reasons_ko: 주가가 200일선 위에 있어 큰 추세가 상승으로 유지되고 있습니다.
catalysts_ko: Amplify CWP Enhanced Dividend Income이(가) 속한 섹터의 실적 시즌.
risks_ko: 상승 여력 제한 — 강한 상승장에서 기초자산에 뒤처집니다(기회비용).
분배금이 총수익을 넘으면 순자산가치(NAV)가 깎일 위험.
분배수익률 ≠ 총수익 — 지급액에 원금 환급분이 포함될 수 있습니다.
실현 변동성이 연 8%로 가격 출렁임이 있습니다.
ETF·키리스라 개별 펀더멘털이 없어 중장기 확신이 제한됩니다.
invalidation_conditions_ko: 50일선(~45.94)을 종가로 내주면 판단을 거둡니다.
시장 전반이 위험회피·조정 국면으로 바뀌면 판단을 거둡니다.
recommendations.fundamental_summary: Covered-call/option-income ETF: distribution yield ~2.3%. Writes calls on SPY — trades upside for income; distribution is not total return and may include return of capital.
recommendations.fundamental_summary_ko: 커버드콜·옵션인컴 ETF: 분배수익률 ~2.3%. SPY에 콜옵션을 매도해 상승 여력을 인컴과 맞바꾸는 구조 — 분배금은 총수익이 아니며 원금 환급분이 섞일 수 있습니다.
recommendations.valuation_summary: Income strategy — judge on TOTAL RETURN vs SPY, not distribution yield; options writing caps upside and distributions may include return of capital.
recommendations.valuation_summary_ko: 인컴 전략 — 분배수익률이 아니라 SPY 대비 '총수익'으로 판단하세요. 옵션 매도가 상승을 제한하고 분배금에 원금 환급분이 섞일 수 있습니다.

bull_scenario.label: bull
bull_scenario.narrative_en: The uptrend holds: sector leadership and inflows stay supportive and buyers defend pullbacks, so the stock keeps making higher highs.
bull_scenario.narrative_ko: 상승 추세 유지 — 섹터 주도력과 자금 유입이 우호적으로 이어지고 눌림목마다 매수가 들어와 고점을 높여가는 흐름입니다.

base_scenario.label: base
base_scenario.narrative_en: The most likely path: it tracks the broad market, drifting sideways to modestly higher without a decisive breakout either way.
base_scenario.narrative_ko: 가장 가능성 높은 경로 — 시장 전체와 보조를 맞춰 뚜렷한 돌파 없이 횡보~완만한 상승에 머무는 흐름입니다.

bear_scenario.label: bear
bear_scenario.narrative_en: Risk case: volatility (~8% annualised) expands, relative strength rolls over, and Amplify CWP Enhanced Dividend Income lags the market on any risk-off turn.
bear_scenario.narrative_ko: 위험 시나리오 — 변동성(연 ~8%)이 커지고 상대강도가 꺾이며, 위험회피 전환 시 Amplify CWP Enhanced Dividend Income이(가) 시장보다 부진한 흐름입니다.

recommendations.dissent_summary: Bull case: in a strong advance the underlying (SPY) typically out-totals a covered-call wrapper; high yield is not outperformance.
recommendations.dissent_summary_ko: 강세 시각: 강한 상승장에서는 기초자산(SPY)의 총수익이 커버드콜을 대개 앞섭니다 — 높은 수익률이 곧 초과성과는 아닙니다.

recommendations.one_line_thesis_en: JPMorgan Nasdaq Equity Premium Inc: REDUCE (medium) — score 44/100, conf 50%.

recommendations.rationale_en: We read JPMorgan Nasdaq Equity Premium Inc as one to trim on the medium horizon — composite score 44/100, 50% confidence. Above all, above its 200-day moving average (primary uptrend intact). That said, capped upside — lags the underlying in strong advances (opportunity cost). We'd step back if a daily close below the 50-day MA (~60.01).
recommendations.rationale_ko: JPMorgan Nasdaq Equity Premium Inc은(는) 중기 관점에서 '비중 축소'로 봅니다. 종합 점수 44/100, 신뢰도 50%입니다. 무엇보다 주가가 200일선 위에 있어 큰 추세가 상승으로 유지되고 있습니다. 다만 상승 여력 제한 — 강한 상승장에서 기초자산에 뒤처집니다(기회비용). 50일선(~60.01)을 종가로 내주면 판단을 거둡니다.
reasons: Above its 200-day moving average (primary uptrend intact).
catalysts: Upcoming macro prints (CPI/PCE, jobs) and FOMC communication.
Sector earnings season relevant to JPMorgan Nasdaq Equity Premium Inc.
risks: Capped upside — lags the underlying in strong advances (opportunity cost).
NAV erosion risk if distributions exceed total return.
Distribution yield ≠ total return; payouts may include return of capital.
ETF/keyless tier: no bottom-up fundamentals (medium-long conviction limited).
invalidation_conditions: A daily close below the 50-day MA (~60.01).

recommendations.fundamental_summary: Covered-call/option-income ETF: distribution yield ~10.0%. Writes calls on QQQ — trades upside for income; distribution is not total return and may include return of capital.

bull_scenario.label: bull
bull_scenario.narrative_en: The uptrend holds: sector leadership and inflows stay supportive and buyers defend pullbacks, so the stock keeps making higher highs.

base_scenario.label: base
base_scenario.narrative_en: The most likely path: it tracks the broad market, drifting sideways to modestly higher without a decisive breakout either way.

bear_scenario.label: bear
bear_scenario.narrative_en: Risk case: volatility (~75% annualised) expands, relative strength rolls over, and Tempus AI lags the market on any risk-off turn.

High net margin (175%) — quality/pricing power.
catalysts: 🔭 Quantum computing: A commercial quantum-computing frontrunner — very high risk, but a paradigm-shifting asymmetric bet if it works.
Upcoming macro prints (CPI/PCE, jobs) and FOMC communication.
Sector earnings season relevant to IonQ.
invalidation_conditions: A daily close below the 50-day MA (~54.90).
Negative earnings-estimate revisions or a guidance cut.
A shift in the broad market to a risk-off / correction state.
catalysts_ko: 🔭 양자컴퓨팅: 상용 양자컴퓨팅 선두주자 — 초고위험이지만 성공 시 판이 바뀌는 비대칭 베팅.

bull_scenario.label: bull
bull_scenario.narrative_en: The uptrend holds: sector leadership and inflows stay supportive and buyers defend pullbacks, so the stock keeps making higher highs.

base_scenario.label: base
base_scenario.narrative_en: The most likely path: it tracks the broad market, drifting sideways to modestly higher without a decisive breakout either way.

bear_scenario.label: bear
bear_scenario.narrative_en: Risk case: volatility (~154% annualised) expands, relative strength rolls over, and SanDisk lags the market on any risk-off turn.

recommendations.dissent_summary: Bull case: a market-state upturn or a positive catalyst could re-rate this faster than the scores imply.

recommendations.rationale_en: We read Welltower as one to accumulate on the medium horizon — composite score 58/100, 63% confidence. Above all, revenue growing 38% YoY. That said, realized volatility 25% (annualised). We'd step back if a daily close below the 50-day MA (~216.99).
recommendations.rationale_ko: Welltower은(는) 중기 관점에서 '분할 매수'로 봅니다. 종합 점수 58/100, 신뢰도 63%입니다. 무엇보다 매출이 전년 대비 38% 성장 중입니다. 다만 실현 변동성이 연 25%로 가격 출렁임이 있습니다. 50일선(~216.99)을 종가로 내주면 판단을 거둡니다.
reasons: Revenue growing 38% YoY.
Above its 200-day moving average (primary uptrend intact).
Positive relative strength vs the S&P 500.
catalysts: Upcoming macro prints (CPI/PCE, jobs) and FOMC communication.
Sector earnings season relevant to Welltower.
risks: Rich valuation (fwd P/E 70) — sensitive to misses.
invalidation_conditions: A daily close below the 50-day MA (~216.99).
Negative earnings-estimate revisions or a guidance cut.
A shift in the broad market to a risk-off / correction state.
reasons_ko: 주가가 200일선 위에 있어 큰 추세가 상승으로 유지되고 있습니다.
risks_ko: 실현 변동성이 연 25%로 가격 출렁임이 있습니다.
밸류가 비쌉니다(선행 P/E 70배) — 실적이 어긋나면 타격이 큽니다.
invalidation_conditions_ko: 50일선(~216.99)을 종가로 내주면 판단을 거둡니다.
실적 추정치 하향이나 가이던스 하향이 나오면 판단을 거둡니다.
시장 전반이 위험회피·조정 국면으로 바뀌면 판단을 거둡니다.

recommendations.rationale_en: We read American Tower as one to avoid on the medium horizon — composite score 33/100, 51% confidence. Above all, ePS estimates revised up (1 up vs 0 down, 30d). That said, realized volatility 34% (annualised). We'd step back if a daily close below the 50-day MA (~178.53).

bull_scenario.label: bull
bull_scenario.narrative_en: The uptrend holds: sector leadership and inflows stay supportive and buyers defend pullbacks, so the stock keeps making higher highs.

base_scenario.label: base
base_scenario.narrative_en: The most likely path: it tracks the broad market, drifting sideways to modestly higher without a decisive breakout either way.

bear_scenario.label: bear

Sector earnings season relevant to Nucor.
invalidation_conditions: A daily close below the 50-day MA (~238.58).

recommendations.rationale_ko: Air Products은(는) 중기 관점에서 '비중 축소'로 봅니다. 종합 점수 44/100, 신뢰도 51%입니다. 무엇보다 주가가 200일선 위에 있어 큰 추세가 상승으로 유지되고 있습니다. 다만 실현 변동성이 연 38%로 가격 출렁임이 있습니다. 50일선(~290.33)을 종가로 내주면 판단을 거둡니다.
reasons: Above its 200-day moving average (primary uptrend intact).
Positive relative strength vs the S&P 500.
catalysts: Upcoming macro prints (CPI/PCE, jobs) and FOMC communication.
Sector earnings season relevant to Air Products.
invalidation_conditions: A daily close below the 50-day MA (~290.33).
Negative earnings-estimate revisions or a guidance cut.
A shift in the broad market to a risk-off / correction state.
reasons_ko: 주가가 200일선 위에 있어 큰 추세가 상승으로 유지되고 있습니다.
catalysts_ko: Air Products이(가) 속한 섹터의 실적 시즌.
risks_ko: 실현 변동성이 연 38%로 가격 출렁임이 있습니다.
invalidation_conditions_ko: 50일선(~290.33)을 종가로 내주면 판단을 거둡니다.
실적 추정치 하향이나 가이던스 하향이 나오면 판단을 거둡니다.
시장 전반이 위험회피·조정 국면으로 바뀌면 판단을 거둡니다.
recommendations.fundamental_summary: net margin 17%; revenue growth 9%; ROE 12%; FCF negative
recommendations.valuation_summary: fwd P/E 21.0; PEG 2.22; analyst mean target $332 (third-party consensus)
recommendations.valuation_summary_ko: 선행 P/E 21.0배; PEG 2.22; 애널리스트 평균 목표가 $332(외부 컨센서스)
recommendations.capital_migration_summary: CMS 42/100 (coverage 35%; from revenue_accel_revisions, moat_barriers, supply_bottleneck_pricing, valuation_upside). Backlog/RPO need deeper filing parsing — reweighted out, not estimated.
recommendations.capital_migration_summary_ko: 자본이동점수(CMS) 42/100 (반영률 35%; 근거: revenue_accel_revisions, moat_barriers, supply_bottleneck_pricing, valuation_upside). 수주잔고·RPO는 추가 공시 파싱 필요 — 추정하지 않고 가중치에서 제외.
recommendations.target_basis_en: Base $299.40; analyst mean $332 scaled to 120d + score tilt → center $293.70; ±6% band (vol- & confidence-adjusted) (model view diverges from analyst consensus).
recommendations.target_basis_ko: 기준가 $299.40; 애널리스트 평균목표 $332를 120일로 환산 + 점수 반영 → 중심 $293.70; ±6% 밴드(변동성·신뢰도 반영) (모델 판단이 애널리스트 컨센서스와 다름).

bull_scenario.label: bull
bull_scenario.narrative_en: The uptrend holds: sector leadership and inflows stay supportive and buyers defend pullbacks, so the stock keeps making higher highs.
bull_scenario.narrative_ko: 상승 추세 유지 — 섹터 주도력과 자금 유입이 우호적으로 이어지고 눌림목마다 매수가 들어와 고점을 높여가는 흐름입니다.

base_scenario.label: base
base_scenario.narrative_en: The most likely path: it tracks the broad market, drifting sideways to modestly higher without a decisive breakout either way.
base_scenario.narrative_ko: 가장 가능성 높은 경로 — 시장 전체와 보조를 맞춰 뚜렷한 돌파 없이 횡보~완만한 상승에 머무는 흐름입니다.

bear_scenario.label: bear
bear_scenario.narrative_en: Risk case: volatility (~38% annualised) expands, relative strength rolls over, and Air Products lags the market on any risk-off turn.
bear_scenario.narrative_ko: 위험 시나리오 — 변동성(연 ~38%)이 커지고 상대강도가 꺾이며, 위험회피 전환 시 Air Products이(가) 시장보다 부진한 흐름입니다.

recommendations.dissent_summary: Bull case: a market-state upturn or a positive catalyst could re-rate this faster than the scores imply.
recommendations.dissent_summary_ko: 강세 시각: 시장 국면이 개선되거나 호재가 나오면 점수가 가리키는 것보다 빠르게 재평가될 수 있습니다.

recommendations.rationale_ko: Union Pacific은(는) 중기 관점에서 '분할 매수'로 봅니다. 종합 점수 60/100, 신뢰도 63%입니다. 무엇보다 최근 30일 EPS 추정치 상향 우세(상향 4·하향 0). 다만 실현 변동성이 연 23%로 가격 출렁임이 있습니다. 50일선(~269.77)을 종가로 내주면 판단을 거둡니다.
reasons: EPS estimates revised up (4 up vs 0 down, 30d).
High net margin (29%) — quality/pricing power.
Above its 200-day moving average (primary uptrend intact).
Positive relative strength vs the S&P 500.
catalysts: Upcoming macro prints (CPI/PCE, jobs) and FOMC communication.
Sector earnings season relevant to Union Pacific.
invalidation_conditions: A daily close below the 50-day MA (~269.77).
Negative earnings-estimate revisions or a guidance cut.
A shift in the broad market to a risk-off / correction state.

시장 전반이 위험회피·조정 국면으로 바뀌면 판단을 거둡니다.

bull_scenario.label: bull
bull_scenario.narrative_en: The uptrend holds: sector leadership and inflows stay supportive and buyers defend pullbacks, so the stock keeps making higher highs.
bull_scenario.narrative_ko: 상승 추세 유지 — 섹터 주도력과 자금 유입이 우호적으로 이어지고 눌림목마다 매수가 들어와 고점을 높여가는 흐름입니다.

base_scenario.label: base
base_scenario.narrative_en: The most likely path: it tracks the broad market, drifting sideways to modestly higher without a decisive breakout either way.
base_scenario.narrative_ko: 가장 가능성 높은 경로 — 시장 전체와 보조를 맞춰 뚜렷한 돌파 없이 횡보~완만한 상승에 머무는 흐름입니다.

bear_scenario.label: bear
bear_scenario.narrative_en: Risk case: volatility (~23% annualised) expands, relative strength rolls over, and Union Pacific lags the market on any risk-off turn.
bear_scenario.narrative_ko: 위험 시나리오 — 변동성(연 ~23%)이 커지고 상대강도가 꺾이며, 위험회피 전환 시 Union Pacific이(가) 시장보다 부진한 흐름입니다.

recommendations.dissent_summary: Bear case: leadership can rotate quickly and the keyless tier lacks fundamental confirmation.
recommendations.dissent_summary_ko: 약세 시각: 주도주는 빠르게 바뀔 수 있고, 키리스 데이터라 펀더멘털 확증이 부족합니다.

recommendations.rationale_en: We read Thermo Fisher as one to accumulate on the medium horizon — composite score 61/100, 63% confidence. Above all, ePS estimates revised up (2 up vs 0 down, 30d). That said, realized volatility 27% (annualised). We'd step back if a daily close below the 50-day MA (~479.89).

Positive relative strength vs the S&P 500.
catalysts: Upcoming macro prints (CPI/PCE, jobs) and FOMC communication.
Sector earnings season relevant to Thermo Fisher.
invalidation_conditions: A daily close below the 50-day MA (~479.89).
Negative earnings-estimate revisions or a guidance cut.
A shift in the broad market to a risk-off / correction state.

base_scenario.label: base
base_scenario.narrative_en: The most likely path: it tracks the broad market, drifting sideways to modestly higher without a decisive breakout either way.

recommendations.rationale_en: We read Kimberly-Clark as one to avoid on the medium horizon — composite score 38/100, 51% confidence. Above all, above its 200-day moving average (primary uptrend intact). That said, realized volatility 33% (annualised). We'd step back if a daily close below the 50-day MA (~102.14).
recommendations.rationale_ko: Kimberly-Clark은(는) 중기 관점에서 '회피'로 봅니다. 종합 점수 38/100, 신뢰도 51%입니다. 무엇보다 주가가 200일선 위에 있어 큰 추세가 상승으로 유지되고 있습니다. 다만 실현 변동성이 연 33%로 가격 출렁임이 있습니다. 50일선(~102.14)을 종가로 내주면 판단을 거둡니다.

Positive relative strength vs the S&P 500.
catalysts: Upcoming macro prints (CPI/PCE, jobs) and FOMC communication.
Sector earnings season relevant to Kimberly-Clark.
invalidation_conditions: A daily close below the 50-day MA (~102.14).
Negative earnings-estimate revisions or a guidance cut.
A shift in the broad market to a risk-off / correction state.

recommendations.rationale_en: We read Synopsys as one to trim on the medium horizon — composite score 38/100, 51% confidence. Above all, revenue growing 42% YoY. That said, realized volatility 28% (annualised). We'd step back if a daily close below the 50-day MA (~476.74).

EPS estimates revised up (11 up vs 4 down, 30d).
catalysts: Upcoming macro prints (CPI/PCE, jobs) and FOMC communication.
Sector earnings season relevant to Synopsys.
invalidation_conditions: A daily close below the 50-day MA (~476.74).
Negative earnings-estimate revisions or a guidance cut.
A shift in the broad market to a risk-off / correction state.

recommendations.rationale_ko: Walmart은(는) 중기 관점에서 '비중 축소'로 봅니다. 종합 점수 36/100, 신뢰도 51%입니다. 무엇보다 신호가 혼재합니다 — 세부 점수를 참고하세요. 다만 실현 변동성이 연 26%로 가격 출렁임이 있습니다. 50일선(~120.66)을 종가로 내주면 판단을 거둡니다.

catalysts: Upcoming macro prints (CPI/PCE, jobs) and FOMC communication.

invalidation_conditions: A daily close below the 50-day MA (~120.66).
Negative earnings-estimate revisions or a guidance cut.
A shift in the broad market to a risk-off / correction state.

bull_scenario.label: bull
bull_scenario.narrative_en: The uptrend holds: sector leadership and inflows stay supportive and buyers defend pullbacks, so the stock keeps making higher highs.
bull_scenario.narrative_ko: 상승 추세 유지 — 섹터 주도력과 자금 유입이 우호적으로 이어지고 눌림목마다 매수가 들어와 고점을 높여가는 흐름입니다.

base_scenario.label: base
base_scenario.narrative_en: The most likely path: it tracks the broad market, drifting sideways to modestly higher without a decisive breakout either way.
base_scenario.narrative_ko: 가장 가능성 높은 경로 — 시장 전체와 보조를 맞춰 뚜렷한 돌파 없이 횡보~완만한 상승에 머무는 흐름입니다.

bear_scenario.label: bear
bear_scenario.narrative_en: Risk case: volatility (~26% annualised) expands, relative strength rolls over, and Walmart lags the market on any risk-off turn.
bear_scenario.narrative_ko: 위험 시나리오 — 변동성(연 ~26%)이 커지고 상대강도가 꺾이며, 위험회피 전환 시 Walmart이(가) 시장보다 부진한 흐름입니다.

recommendations.dissent_summary: Bull case: a market-state upturn or a positive catalyst could re-rate this faster than the scores imply.

bull_scenario.label: bull
bull_scenario.narrative_en: The uptrend holds: sector leadership and inflows stay supportive and buyers defend pullbacks, so the stock keeps making higher highs.

base_scenario.label: base
base_scenario.narrative_en: The most likely path: it tracks the broad market, drifting sideways to modestly higher without a decisive breakout either way.

bear_scenario.label: bear

recommendations.dissent_summary: Bull case: a market-state upturn or a positive catalyst could re-rate this faster than the scores imply.

Sector earnings season relevant to Caterpillar.

bull_scenario.label: bull
bull_scenario.narrative_en: The uptrend holds: sector leadership and inflows stay supportive and buyers defend pullbacks, so the stock keeps making higher highs.

base_scenario.label: base
base_scenario.narrative_en: The most likely path: it tracks the broad market, drifting sideways to modestly higher without a decisive breakout either way.

recommendations.rationale_en: We read Merck as a hold on the medium horizon — composite score 49/100, 68% confidence. Above all, above its 200-day moving average (primary uptrend intact). That said, realized volatility 35% (annualised). We'd step back if a daily close below the 50-day MA (~118.72).

catalysts: Upcoming macro prints (CPI/PCE, jobs) and FOMC communication.

invalidation_conditions: A daily close below the 50-day MA (~118.72).
Negative earnings-estimate revisions or a guidance cut.
A shift in the broad market to a risk-off / correction state.

recommendations.rationale_en: We read JPMorgan Chase as a hold on the medium horizon — composite score 57/100, 68% confidence. Above all, ePS estimates revised up (5 up vs 1 down, 30d). That said, realized volatility 25% (annualised). We'd step back if a daily close below the 50-day MA (~316.18).
recommendations.rationale_ko: JPMorgan Chase은(는) 중기 관점에서 '보유'로 봅니다. 종합 점수 57/100, 신뢰도 68%입니다. 무엇보다 최근 30일 EPS 추정치 상향 우세(상향 5·하향 1). 다만 실현 변동성이 연 25%로 가격 출렁임이 있습니다. 50일선(~316.18)을 종가로 내주면 판단을 거둡니다.
reasons: EPS estimates revised up (5 up vs 1 down, 30d).
High net margin (34%) — quality/pricing power.
Above its 200-day moving average (primary uptrend intact).
Positive relative strength vs the S&P 500.
catalysts: Upcoming macro prints (CPI/PCE, jobs) and FOMC communication.
Sector earnings season relevant to JPMorgan Chase.
invalidation_conditions: A daily close below the 50-day MA (~316.18).
Negative earnings-estimate revisions or a guidance cut.
A shift in the broad market to a risk-off / correction state.
reasons_ko: 주가가 200일선 위에 있어 큰 추세가 상승으로 유지되고 있습니다.

bull_scenario.label: bull
bull_scenario.narrative_en: The uptrend holds: sector leadership and inflows stay supportive and buyers defend pullbacks, so the stock keeps making higher highs.
bull_scenario.narrative_ko: 상승 추세 유지 — 섹터 주도력과 자금 유입이 우호적으로 이어지고 눌림목마다 매수가 들어와 고점을 높여가는 흐름입니다.

base_scenario.label: base
base_scenario.narrative_en: The most likely path: it tracks the broad market, drifting sideways to modestly higher without a decisive breakout either way.
base_scenario.narrative_ko: 가장 가능성 높은 경로 — 시장 전체와 보조를 맞춰 뚜렷한 돌파 없이 횡보~완만한 상승에 머무는 흐름입니다.

bear_scenario.label: bear
bear_scenario.narrative_en: Risk case: volatility (~25% annualised) expands, relative strength rolls over, and JPMorgan Chase lags the market on any risk-off turn.
bear_scenario.narrative_ko: 위험 시나리오 — 변동성(연 ~25%)이 커지고 상대강도가 꺾이며, 위험회피 전환 시 JPMorgan Chase이(가) 시장보다 부진한 흐름입니다.

recommendations.dissent_summary: Bull case: a market-state upturn or a positive catalyst could re-rate this faster than the scores imply.

recommendations.rationale_en: We read Astera Labs as a hold on the medium horizon — composite score 46/100, 68% confidence. Above all, revenue growing 93% YoY. That said, realized volatility 125% (annualised). We'd step back if a daily close below the 50-day MA (~331.81).

EPS estimates revised up (2 up vs 0 down, 30d).
High net margin (27%) — quality/pricing power.
Above its 200-day moving average (primary uptrend intact).
catalysts: Upcoming macro prints (CPI/PCE, jobs) and FOMC communication.
Sector earnings season relevant to Astera Labs.
risks: Rich valuation (fwd P/E 84) — sensitive to misses.
invalidation_conditions: A daily close below the 50-day MA (~331.81).
Negative earnings-estimate revisions or a guidance cut.
A shift in the broad market to a risk-off / correction state.

risks: Rich valuation (fwd P/E 153) — sensitive to misses.
invalidation_conditions: A daily close below the 50-day MA (~409.93).
Negative earnings-estimate revisions or a guidance cut.
A shift in the broad market to a risk-off / correction state.
